mainQuestTheme: Letting original creative force take form without forcing expression, performing uniqueness, or abandoning the signal before it matures.

mainQuestContent.title: Foundation of Original Expression

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: The creative signal is present, but it needs a container before exposure.

questBrief.mission: Protect the first creative impulse long enough for it to find form.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Notice the raw expression that is not ready for the room yet.

fieldBriefing.collapsedPreview: Do not expose it too early.
fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This quest begins with original creative force before it has structure. Something wants to be expressed, but the first movement needs privacy, stability, and form before it can survive attention.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: Early exposure can distort the signal. Foundation gives originality enough weight to become real.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You show the spark before it has enough shape to survive being seen.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Where are you exposing the beginning before it has form?

assetsAndFriction.questTrap: You confuse being seen with being ready.
frictionSignals: abandoning the idea after weak feedback
assetsAndFriction.livePrompt: Watch where attention starts shaping the work too soon.

groundingEffect.somaticShift: The body protects the signal without clenching around it.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Can your belly hold the work before the world sees it?

unlockCondition.questKey: Receive the spark → give it one stable form → share only after the signal holds
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: The body feels quietly committed before seeking response.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Make one private draft before showing anyone.
unlockCondition.alignmentReminder: The first spark needs form, not applause.
unlockCondition.livePrompt: Give the signal a container before exposure.

driftPattern: exposing the work before it has form
letting early reaction distort the signal

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: The expression is strongest when it is not trying to prove itself.

questBrief.mission: Let the creative signal be visible without performing originality.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Notice where expression is already alive before you improve it.

fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This line carries creative presence naturally. The signal is visible when it is not forced, exaggerated, or dressed up to prove that it is original.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: The gift is natural radiance. The risk is interfering with it by trying to become more impressive.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You start performing originality right when the real thing is already there.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Where are you making the signal louder because you do not trust it?

assetsAndFriction.questTrap: You decorate the signal until it loses authority.
frictionSignals: adding drama to a clean signal

groundingEffect.somaticShift: The body expresses without reaching for attention.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Are you expressing, or trying to be recognized as expressive?

unlockCondition.questKey: Notice the natural signal → express it plainly → stop before performance takes over
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: The body feels visible without strain.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Share the simplest true version first.
unlockCondition.alignmentReminder: Originality does not need to announce itself.
unlockCondition.livePrompt: Let the clean signal be enough.

mainQuestContent.title: Creative Trial and Error

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: The work finds itself by failing in public and private ways.

questBrief.mission: Let failed versions reveal what the creative signal is actually becoming.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Track what survives after the expression meets reality.
questBrief.livePrompt: What part of the work keeps surviving revision?

fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This line discovers originality through attempts, revisions, misfires, and feedback. The creative signal becomes clearer by testing what does not hold.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: Failed versions are not proof the signal is wrong. They show what the signal is not.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You keep changing the work, but avoid admitting what failed.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Where are you revising without learning?

assetsAndFriction.questTrap: You call every revision growth instead of naming the miss.

groundingEffect.somaticShift: The body stops defending the work and starts receiving information.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Can your stomach stay soft while the work is corrected?

unlockCondition.questKey: Test one version → name what failed → keep only what strengthens the signal
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: The body feels clearer after the false part is released.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Write one thing the attempt disproved before revising.
unlockCondition.alignmentReminder: A changed work is only progress if the lesson is named.

driftPattern: protecting weak versions from honest feedback

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: Originality becomes useful when others can meet it.

questBrief.mission: Translate original expression into a form others can recognize and respond to.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Find the structure that lets the creative signal travel.
questBrief.livePrompt: Who needs the work made reachable?

fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This line turns originality into influence through form, language, rhythm, design, or shared context. The work must stay true while becoming accessible enough to enter the field.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: Expression that cannot be met stays isolated. Translation lets originality create impact without losing its center.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You keep it too pure to be touched, then wonder why it does not move anyone.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Where does the work need a bridge without becoming diluted?

assetsAndFriction.questTrap: You protect originality from the very audience it needs.

groundingEffect.somaticShift: The body stays loyal to the signal while allowing response.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Can your chest stay open while the work is received?

unlockCondition.questKey: Name the core signal → choose one reachable form → let response refine the delivery
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: The body feels connected without surrendering the work.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Show the work in one form another person can actually enter.
unlockCondition.livePrompt: Make the signal reachable without flattening it.

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: People project meaning onto the work before they understand the signal.

questBrief.mission: Hold creative visibility without letting others define what the work means.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Separate the signal from what people want it to represent.
questBrief.livePrompt: Where is the work being made larger than it is?

fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This line can carry creative authority that others amplify, idealize, criticize, or turn into a symbol. The work becomes a projection surface.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: Influence grows here, but so does distortion. The task is to clarify the signal before projection turns it into a role.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You let them believe the work is bigger because the projection feels powerful.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Where is attention tempting you to overclaim the signal?

assetsAndFriction.questTrap: You become the symbol instead of stewarding the work.
frictionSignals: performing the role people attach to the work
avoiding correction because attention feels useful
assetsAndFriction.livePrompt: Watch where visibility starts owning the signal.

groundingEffect.somaticShift: The body stops rising into the symbol and returns to the actual work.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Are you speaking from the signal, or from what they want it to mean?

unlockCondition.questKey: State the creative signal → mark its limits → correct projection before it becomes identity
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: The body feels centered when the work is no larger than the truth.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Name what the work is not before letting others build on it.
unlockCondition.livePrompt: Separate the work from the projection.

mainQuestContent.title: Creative Completion Beyond Approval

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: The work is complete when the signal no longer needs response to exist.

questBrief.mission: Discern when expression is complete, whether or not it receives recognition.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Notice which work feels finished before anyone confirms it.

fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This line sees the larger arc of creative expression. Some work is meant to be shared, some refined, some released, and some completed without public confirmation.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: If approval determines completion, the work never belongs to itself. Maturity comes from knowing when the signal has finished its own cycle.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You call it unfinished because no one has praised it yet.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Where are you using response as proof that the work exists?

assetsAndFriction.questTrap: You keep the work open so someone else can close it for you.
assetsAndFriction.livePrompt: Watch where approval replaces inner finality.

groundingProtocol: relax the back of the neck
groundingEffect.somaticShift: The body allows the work to be complete without reaching outward.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Can your spine hold the finished signal without looking for applause?

unlockCondition.questKey: Assess the signal → mark the work complete → release the need for response
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: The body feels finished even without external confirmation.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Declare the work complete before checking how it lands.
unlockCondition.livePrompt: Let the signal finish on its own terms.

driftPattern: keeping finished work open for validation

perkTrees.subtitle: Develop the capacities behind Foundation of Original Expression.

nodes.name: Creative Authority
nodes.description: This path develops the ability to express original creative force through foundation of original expression.
nodes.effect: Originality becomes stable when the signal is protected, expressed, tested, translated, clarified, and completed cleanly.
nodes.developmentCue: Notice whether the creative signal is asking for form, expression, revision, translation, clarification, or completion.
nodes.masteryMarker: You can create without performing, overexplaining, or waiting for permission to exist.

nodes.name: Signal Protection
nodes.description: You learn to recognize the creative signal before reaction, pressure, or projection distorts it.
nodes.effect: Original expression becomes easier to protect and shape.
nodes.developmentCue: Identify the signal before deciding how visible it should become.
nodes.masteryMarker: You can separate the work itself from the response around it.

nodes.name: Creative Containment
nodes.description: The body learns to hold creative force without rushing into exposure or performance.
nodes.effect: Expression becomes grounded instead of reactive.
nodes.developmentCue: Let the body stabilize before the signal leaves the system.
nodes.masteryMarker: You remain physically steady while creating, sharing, revising, or closing the work.

nodes.name: Form Building
nodes.description: The creative field becomes stronger when the signal can meet response without losing its center.
nodes.effect: Originality can influence others without becoming shaped entirely by them.
nodes.developmentCue: Watch how the field receives, changes, or projects onto the work.
nodes.masteryMarker: You can let the work enter the world without surrendering its core.

nodes.name: Stable Originality
nodes.description: The full path matures into self-authorized creation that does not depend on performance or approval.
nodes.effect: The work becomes complete because the signal has fulfilled its own form.
nodes.developmentCue: Let the expression finish according to its own integrity.
nodes.masteryMarker: Creative authority remains intact whether the work is hidden, shared, praised, misunderstood, or complete.
